arts.ttl: Chelsea XI vs Astana – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Chelsea make the long trip to Kazakhstan to face FC Astana in the Europa Conference League this afternoon. The trip to take on Astana is the furthest-ever European journey the Blues have made and freezing conditions await Enzo Maresca’s side. arts.ttl: Chelsea receive clear Jhon Duran transfer message after £40m deal and contract talks
arts.sum: In-demand Aston Villa striker Jhon Duran has admitted he is enjoying his current battle with Ollie Watkins - as insisted he loves life at Villa Park despite nearly joining Chelsea in the summer. Chelsea tried to sign Duran from Villa earlier this year, with the Blues allowed to discuss personal terms with the player .

The West Londoners currently top the league phase after collecting maximum points from their opening four games. arts.ttl: “Fascinating” Enzo Maresca has Chelsea in title race and “hard to argue against” Blues being a better project than Arsenal
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca certainly seems to be succeeding at Chelsea where Messrs. Potter, Lampard and Pochettino failed, with the Blues absolutely in the Premier League title race this season. There’s a togetherness about the team in 24/25 which hasn’t been notable before, and the manager has to be given credit for that.
